title: Cryptography and Network Security Fundamentals
description: A flowchart illustrating the core concepts, methods, and goals of cryptography within network security.
relationships: Plaintext is encrypted using an Encryption Algorithm and a Secret Key to produce Ciphertext
Ciphertext is transmitted over a (potentially insecure) Network
Ciphertext is decrypted by the Authorized Recipient using a Decryption Algorithm and the correct Secret Key to recover the original Plaintext
Authentication & Integrity Checks are used to verify the sender's identity and that the data was not altered in transit
